dashboard.label: BB ICT v4.0 Compliance Dashboard
dashboard.description: Bangladesh Bank ICT Guidelines v4.0 Compliance Monitoring — BankStack SOC

search.query: index=bankstack_wazuh sourcetype=wazuh-alerts rule.groups{}="compliance" | stats count(eval(rule.level>=10)) as violations, count as total | eval compliance_pct=round(((total-violations)/total)*100, 1) | fields compliance_pct

index=bankstack_wazuh rule.groups{}="bb_ict" | stats count as violations, latest(_time) as last_seen by rule.description | eval status=if(violations>0, "FAIL", "PASS") | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | sort -violations | rename rule.description as "Control", violations as "Violations", last_seen as "Last Seen", status as "Status"
index=bankstack_wazuh (rule.groups{}="authentication_failed" OR rule.groups{}="brute_force" OR rule.groups{}="mfa_bypass") | timechart span=1h count by rule.groups{}
index=bankstack_wazuh (rule.groups{}="privilege_escalation" OR rule.groups{}="control_bypass" OR rule.groups{}="unusual_access") | timechart span=1h count by rule.groups{}
index=bankstack_wazuh rule.groups{}="audit_tampering" | table _time, agent.name, data.system, user, rule.description | sort -_time
index=bankstack_wazuh rule.groups{}="backup_failure" | table _time, data.system, rule.description | sort -_time

panel.title: SCA Assessment Results — BD Banking Policy

search.query: index=bankstack_wazuh data.sca.policy_id="bd_banking_server" | stats latest(data.sca.passed) as passed, latest(data.sca.failed) as failed, latest(data.sca.score) as score by agent.name | eval total=passed+failed | eval compliance=round((passed/total)*100, 1)."%" | sort -score
